items.title: Two-Year Retention of Benefits After Paired Vagus Nerve Stimulation in Stroke: Follow-Up of the VNS-REHAB Randomized Clinical Trial.
items.abstract: Vagus nerve stimulation (VNS) paired with rehabilitation improves short-term upper extremity (UE) function in people with chronic ischemic stroke. Because sustained improvements are needed for people with stroke, we examined the long-term effects of Paired VNS on impairment, activity, participation, and quality of life. This is a post hoc analysis of 2-year data of the triple-blind, sham-controlled, randomized VNS-REHAB pivotal trial. After receiving the full therapeutic protocol with either real (Active) or sham (Control) VNS, participants continued self-activated active stimulation for at least 2 years. The Fugl-Meyer Assessment-Upper Extremity (FMA-UE), Wolf Motor Function Test (WMFT), participation, and quality of life outcomes were assessed at multiple time points. Pooled 2-year outcome data were available from 49 participants. At the 2-year point, FMA-UE scores improved 7.51 points (95% CI 5.80-9.22;  The sustained improvements in UE impairment and function for at least 2 years make this an important treatment option for a defined subset of individuals with chronic arm and hand deficits after ischemic stroke. ClinicalTrials.gov/study/NCT03131960.
items.summary_ja:
背景：慢性虚血性脳卒中患者の上肢機能改善において、迷走神経刺激（VNS）とリハビリの併用が短期的効果を示しているが、長期的効果は不明であった。  
方法：VNS-REHAB試験の二重盲検・偽刺激対照ランダム化臨床試験の2年追跡データを用いた事後解析を実施。参加者は実際のVNS（Active群）または偽刺激（Control群）を受けた後、自己刺激を2年以上継続。Fugl-Meyer Assessment-Upper Extremity（FMA-UE）、Wolf Motor Function Test（WMFT）、参加度、生活の質を複数時点で評価した。  
結果：49名の2年追跡データで、FMA-UEスコアは平均7.51点（95%信頼区間5.80-9.22）改善し、上肢の障害と機能の持続的改善が確認された。  
結論：慢性虚血性脳卒中後の腕・手の機能障害を持つ特定の患者に対し、VNS併用リハビリは少なくとも2年間の有効な治療選択肢となる。
items.summary_short_ja: 慢性虚血性脳卒中患者に対する迷走神経刺激（VNS）とリハビリの併用は、上肢機能を短期的に改善する。本研究はVNS-REHAB試験の2年追跡データを解析し、VNS群はFugl-Meyer評価で7.51点の有意な改善を示した。上肢障害と機能の改善が2年以上持続し、慢性脳卒中後の上肢障害に対する有効な治療選択肢となることを示した。

items.title: Orexin, Sleep, and Cognition in Alzheimer Disease: Non-REM Oscillatory Activity and Neural Resilience.
items.abstract: Sleep-wake dysregulation and elevated CSF orexin have been implicated in Alzheimer disease (AD). Sleep spindles (SPs) and slow oscillations (SOs) are linked to cognition and neurodegeneration; however, their relationship with CSF orexin concentrations in symptomatic AD has not been characterized. We investigated whether nonrapid eye movement (NREM) SP-SO activity is associated with CSF orexin and whether these oscillatory features moderate associations between orexin, cognition, neuropsychiatric symptom severity, and AD biomarkers. This prospective observational cohort study was conducted at a tertiary memory clinic in Lleida, Spain. Individuals aged ≥60 years with biomarker-confirmed mild-to-moderate AD (National Institute on Aging-Alzheimer's Association criteria) underwent overnight polysomnography and morning CSF sampling. SP and SO were detected using validated automated algorithms with independent verification and visual quality control. CSF was assayed for orexin-A, amyloid-β42 (Aβ42), phosphorylated tau181 (pTau181), total tau, and YKL-40. Cognitive performance Alzheimer's Disease Assessment Scale-Cognitive Subscale ([ADAS-Cog], Mini-Mental State Examination (MMSE), California verbal learning test, ROCF) and neuropsychiatric symptoms (NPI) were assessed longitudinally over 36 months. Associations were examined using generalized linear models with robust estimators adjusted for age, sex, Aβ42, and apnea-hypopnea index. Multiple comparisons were controlled using false discovery rate correction. Interaction terms assessed moderation effects. Sixty participants (30 women; mean age 74.7 years) were included. Longer SO duration and higher SP density and power were associated with lower CSF orexin concentrations (SP density: β = -187.37 pg/mL, 95% CI -344.93 to -29.80). Orexin was not associated with global sleep continuity metrics. Higher CSF orexin concentrations were associated with worse global cognition (ADAS-Cog: β = 0.014, 95% CI 0.003-0.024; MMSE: β = -0.01, 95% CI -0.011 to -0.004) and greater neuropsychiatric symptom severity (NPI at: β = 0.03, 95% CI 0.011-0.041). Higher orexin was also associated with higher pTau181 (β = 0.11, 95% CI 0.04-0.19), total tau, and YKL-40 (β = 0.37, 95% CI 0.17-0.57). Significant orexin × SP-SO interactions were observed, such that greater oscillatory activity attenuated the adverse associations between orexin and cognitive outcomes, independent of Aβ42 and tau. In biomarker-confirmed AD, NREM SP and SO activity are associated with CSF orexin concentrations and moderate associations between orexin and longitudinal cognitive and neuropsychiatric outcomes. Limitations include the observational design and absence of a comparator group, precluding causal inference and limiting contextualization relative to normal aging. NREM oscillatory metrics and orexin concentrations may represent complementary physiologic markers for disease monitoring and therapeutic targeting. Role of Hypoxia and Sleep Fragmentation in AD; ClinicalTrials.gov Identifier: NCT02814045.
items.summary_ja: 背景：アルツハイマー病（AD）では睡眠覚醒リズムの乱れと脳脊髄液（CSF）中のオレキシン増加が報告されているが、非レム睡眠（NREM）のスリープスピンドル（SP）やスローオシレーション（SO）とオレキシンの関係は不明であった。方法：スペインのメモリークリニックで、バイオマーカーで確認された軽度から中等度のAD患者60名（平均年齢74.7歳）を対象に、夜間ポリソムノグラフィーと朝のCSF採取を実施。SPとSOは自動検出し、CSF中のオレキシンA、アミロイドβ42、リン酸化タウ181、総タウ、YKL-40を測定。認知機能と神経精神症状を36か月間追跡評価した。結果：SOの持続時間延長およびSPの密度・パワー増加はCSFオレキシン濃度の低下と関連した。高オレキシン濃度は認知機能低下（ADAS-Cog、MMSE）や神経精神症状の悪化、pTau181や総タウ、YKL-40の増加と関連した。一方、SP-SO活動が高いほどオレキシンと認知機能悪化の関連は緩和された。結論：AD患者において、NREMのSPおよびSO活動はCSFオレキシン濃度と関連し、オレキシンと認知・神経精神症状の進行との関係を調整する可能性がある。これらは病態モニタリングや治療標的として有望であるが、観察研究で比較群がないため因果関係の解明には限界がある。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、バイオマーカーで確認されたアルツハイマー病（AD）患者60名を対象に、非レム睡眠中の睡眠紡錘波（SP）と徐波（SO）活動が脳脊髄液中オレキシン濃度と関連し、オレキシンと認知機能・神経精神症状の悪化との関係を緩和することを示した。高オレキシンは認知障害や神経変性マーカーの増加と関連するが、SP-SO活動がこれらの悪影響を軽減し、ADの生理学的指標および治療標的となる可能性が示唆された。

items.title: Effect of Parity and β-Amyloid on Cognition and Hippocampal Volume in Postmenopausal Women.
items.abstract: Epidemiologic studies exploring the effect of parity on Alzheimer disease (AD) yield mixed results, and little is known about how parity may modify the impact of AD pathology on brain and cognitive aging. We examined the effect of parity and AD pathology on hippocampal volume (HV) and cognitive changes in cognitively unimpaired (CU) postmenopausal women. Analysis was performed on CU postmenopausal women from the ALFA+ observational cohort based in the BarcelonaBeta Brain research center, who completed 1 or 2 visits spaced by ∼3 years (mean = 3.38, SD = 0.55) with reproductive data, cognitive testing (modified Preclinical Alzheimer's Cognitive Composite), CSF biomarkers (Aβ42 and Aβ40), and structural MRI. We used linear mixed-effects models to investigate the interactive effects of parity, time, and Aβ status (based on CSF Aβ42/Aβ40) on cognition and HV.  A total of 254 women were included in our analyses ranging from 49.2 to 73.4 years (mean age = 61.2) at visit 1. A significant interaction between parity and Aβ status was observed for cognitive decline and HV. In women with positive amyloid status, higher parity was associated with steeper cognitive decline (β = -0.035, 95% CI -0.068 to -0.003,  In CU postmenopausal women, higher parity interacts with AD pathology to influence cognitive decline and HV reductions. These findings suggest that parity may affect resilience to AD pathology in preclinical AD stages.
items.summary_ja:
背景：出産回数（経産回数）がアルツハイマー病（AD）に与える影響については疫学的に結果が分かれており、AD病理が脳や認知機能に及ぼす影響に対する経産回数の修飾効果は不明である。  
方法：認知機能に問題のない閉経後女性254名（平均年齢61.2歳）を対象に、約3年の間隔で2回の訪問を行い、出産歴、認知機能検査（修正版前臨床アルツハイマー認知複合検査）、脳脊髄液中のβアミロイド（Aβ42/Aβ40比）、およびMRIによる海馬体積を測定した。線形混合効果モデルを用いて、経産回数、時間、Aβ状態の相互作用が認知機能と海馬体積に与える影響を解析した。  
結果：Aβ陽性群において、経産回数が多いほど認知機能の低下が顕著であり（β = -0.035）、海馬体積の減少も強く認められた。  
結論：閉経後の認知正常女性において、経産回数はAD病理と相互作用し、認知機能低下および海馬体積減少に影響を与える。これらの結果は、経産回数が前臨床段階のADに対する脳の抵抗性に関与する可能性を示唆する。
items.summary_short_ja: 閉経後の認知機能正常女性254名を対象に、出産回数（経産回数）とアルツハイマー病（AD）病理の影響を調査した。βアミロイド陽性群では、経産回数が多いほど認知機能低下と海馬容積減少が顕著であった。これにより、経産回数がAD病理に対する脳の抵抗力や認知機能の変化に影響を与える可能性が示唆された。

items.title: Pearls & Oy-sters: Radiologic Lag in Pediatric-Onset Multiple Sclerosis.
items.abstract: Recognition of radiologic lag, the presence of clinical symptoms despite absence of a visible corresponding lesion on MRI, is essential when evaluating a patient suspected to have a demyelinating disease. In this report, we present the case of a 16-year-old girl with bilateral internuclear ophthalmoplegias (INO), in whom initial high-resolution 3T MRI failed to reveal an abnormality within the brainstem. Repeat MRI performed 2 months later demonstrated a lesion in the paramedian midbrain tegmentum, corresponding to the anatomical localization of her clinical symptoms. This case aims to raise awareness that radiologic lag can occur in pediatric-onset multiple sclerosis, similarly to what has been described in other demyelinating conditions such as myelin oligodendrocyte glycoprotein antibody-associated disease. The absence of a visible lesion on imaging in the context of an acute INO does not exclude the possibility of underlying demyelination, and short-interval follow-up imaging should be considered in these patients to establish the correct diagnosis and guide additional investigations and treatment.
items.summary_ja:
背景：脱髄疾患の診断において、臨床症状があるにもかかわらずMRIで対応する病変が確認できない「放射線学的遅延（radiologic lag）」の認識が重要である。  
方法：16歳の少女が両側内核性眼筋麻痺（INO）を呈し、初回の高解像度3T MRIでは脳幹に異常が認められなかったが、2か月後の再検査で中脳正中部の病変が確認された症例を報告。  
結果：初回MRIで病変が不明瞭であったにもかかわらず、症状に対応する部位に後日病変が出現し、放射線学的遅延が示された。  
結論：小児発症多発性硬化症においても放射線学的遅延が起こりうるため、急性INO症例で初回画像に異常がなくても脱髄疾患の可能性を否定せず、短期間での再検査を行い正確な診断と治療方針決定に役立てるべきである。
items.summary_short_ja: 16歳の少女の両側内側縦束麻痺（INO）症例で、初回の高解像度3T MRIでは脳幹に異常が認められなかったが、2か月後の再検査で中脳の病変が確認された。小児発症多発性硬化症においても、臨床症状に先行してMRIに病変が現れない「放射線学的遅延」が起こり得ることを示し、急性INO患者では短期間の再検査が診断と治療方針決定に重要であることを強調している。

items.title: Long-Term Outcomes After Ischemic Stroke Across Atrial Fibrillation Phenotypes Defined by Detection Timing and Prior Anticoagulation Status.
items.abstract: Atrial fibrillation (AF)-associated ischemic stroke is often managed as a single clinical entity; however, prognosis may vary depending on whether AF was detected after the stroke or whether the stroke occurred despite prior oral anticoagulant (OAC) use. We aimed to describe long-term outcomes after ischemic stroke across 3 distinct AF phenotypes: AF complicated by ischemic stroke despite prior anticoagulation (AFIDA), AF complicated by ischemic stroke without prior anticoagulation (OAC-naive AF), and AF detected after stroke (AFDAS). This nationwide cohort study used the DeSC-IQVIA database, an administrative claims database covering approximately 16 million individuals in Japan. Adult stroke survivors with AF discharged with OAC prescriptions between April 2014 and January 2025 were included. Three mutually exclusive AF phenotypes defined by AF detection timing and prior anticoagulation status: AFIDA, OAC-naive AF, and AFDAS (diagnosed during the index hospitalization). The primary outcomes were hospitalization for recurrent ischemic stroke or systemic embolism (SE). The secondary outcomes included major bleeding, heart failure (HF) hospitalization, and all-cause mortality. Cumulative incidence was estimated using the Aalen-Johansen method, accounting for the competing risk of death. Adjusted subdistribution hazard ratios (aSHRs) were estimated using Fine-Gray models. Among 21,586 patients (median age, 83 years [interquartile range (IQR), 78-88 years]; 10,604 [49.1%] female), 6,604 (30.6%) were classified as having AFIDA, 11,875 (55.0%) as having OAC-naive AF, and 3,107 (14.4%) as having AFDAS. During the 38,593 person-years of follow-up, 2,028 patients experienced stroke/SE. The 5-year cumulative incidence of stroke/SE was highest in AFIDA (18.6% [95% CI 17.0%-20.2%]), followed by OAC-naive AF (13.0% [95% CI 12.0%-13.9%]) and AFDAS (10.5% [95% CI 9.0%-12.1%]). Compared with OAC-naive AF, AFIDA was associated with a higher risk of recurrent stroke/SE (aSHR, 1.38; 95% CI 1.25-1.52), whereas AFDAS was associated with a lower risk (aSHR, 0.87; 95% CI 0.75-1.00). Among secondary outcomes, AFIDA showed an increased risk of HF hospitalization (aSHR, 1.15; 95% CI 1.02-1.31). Long-term prognosis after AF-associated stroke is heterogeneous across AF phenotypes, with AFIDA representing a high-risk group and AFDAS representing a low-risk group. These findings highlight the need to treat these clinically identifiable phenotypes as distinct target populations for secondary prevention strategies and future clinical trials.
items.summary_ja:
背景：心房細動（AF）に関連する虚血性脳卒中は一括して扱われることが多いが、AFの検出時期や抗凝固療法の有無により予後が異なる可能性がある。  
方法：日本の行政請求データベースを用い、2014年4月から2025年1月までにAFを伴う脳卒中生存者21,586人を対象に、抗凝固療法使用歴とAF検出時期で3群（AFIDA：抗凝固療法中の脳卒中、OAC-naive AF：抗凝固未使用、AFDAS：脳卒中後にAF検出）に分類し、再発脳卒中・全身性塞栓症（SE）や心不全入院、死亡率を追跡した。  
結果：追跡期間中に2,028例が再発脳卒中/SEを発症。5年累積発症率はAFIDA群が18.6%、OAC-naive AF群が13.0%、AFDAS群が10.5%であった。AFIDAはOAC-naive AFに比べ再発リスクが有意に高く（aSHR 1.38）、AFDASは低リスクであった（aSHR 0.87）。さらにAFIDA群は心不全入院リスクも増加した。  
結論：AF関連脳卒中の長期予後はAFの臨床的表現型により異なり、抗凝固療法中の発症群（AFIDA）は高リスク群、脳卒中後にAFが検出された群（AFDAS）は低リスク群である。これらの表現型を区別し、二次予防戦略や臨床試験の対象とすべきである。
items.summary_short_ja: 心房細動（AF）関連虚血性脳卒中の長期予後は、AFの検出時期と抗凝固療法の有無により異なる。本研究は、抗凝固療法中に発症したAFIDA群、未治療のOAC-naive AF群、発症後にAFが検出されたAFDAS群の3群を比較。AFIDA群は再発脳卒中・塞栓症リスクが最も高く（5年発症率18.6%）、AFDAS群は最も低リスクであった。これらのAF表現型ごとに異なる二次予防戦略が必要であることを示した。

items.title: Clinical Evaluation of the Revised Biological and Clinical Staging Criteria for Alzheimer Disease in China.
items.abstract: The 2024 revised criteria introduced an integrated framework for staging Alzheimer disease (AD) across biological and clinical dimensions. However, how this criterion characterizes clinical and biological features in populations outside the original development setting, particularly in non-Western and specialized clinic settings, remains insufficiently described. We consecutively enrolled 1,214 memory clinic participants who underwent both amyloid-PET and tau-PET imaging. Among amyloid-positive (A+) individuals, clinical stages (0-6) and biological stages (A-D) were assigned according to the 2024 criteria. Participants were classified as typical (concordant stages), susceptible (clinical > biological), or resilient (clinical < biological). Plasma p-tau217 was measured in 379 A+ participants. Associations were examined using generalized linear models adjusted for relevant covariates, with false discovery rate correction for multiple comparisons. Among the 1,214 participants, 818 were amyloid positive, comprising 412 (50.4%) typical, 330 (40.3%) susceptible, and 76 (9.3%) resilient individuals. Plasma p-tau217 increased progressively across advancing tau PET stages ( In a large cohort from a specialized tertiary memory clinic, clinical-biological stage discordance under the 2024 AD criteria was common among amyloid-positive individuals. Distinct cognitive, educational, biomarker, and neuroanatomic profiles characterized susceptible, typical, and resilient subgroups. In addition, plasma p-tau217 showed a stepwise increase across tau PET stages, supporting its utility as a blood-based marker of tau pathology severity. These findings support the clinical relevance of the revised staging framework and may inform future refinements of AD diagnostic guidelines. This study provides Class II evidence that the 2024 revised biological and clinical criteria for AD demonstrate clinical utility in a Chinese cohort from a specialized tertiary memory clinic.
items.summary_ja:
背景：2024年に改訂されたアルツハイマー病（AD）の生物学的・臨床的統合ステージング基準は、西洋以外の集団や専門クリニックでの適用例が少なく、その特徴が十分に検証されていない。  
方法：中国の専門的な三次記憶クリニックに通院する1,214名の参加者を対象に、アミロイドPETおよびタウPET検査を実施。アミロイド陽性者（A+）818名に対し、2024年基準に基づく臨床ステージ（0-6）と生物学的ステージ（A-D）を割り当て、典型型（両者一致）、感受型（臨床＞生物学的）、回復型（臨床＜生物学的）に分類。379名のA+参加者で血漿p-tau217も測定した。  
結果：A+群のうち50.4%が典型型、40.3%が感受型、9.3%が回復型であった。血漿p-tau217はタウPETステージの進行に伴い段階的に増加し、感受型・典型型・回復型は認知機能、教育歴、バイオマーカー、神経解剖学的特徴で明確に異なった。  
結論：2024年改訂基準は中国の専門クリニック集団において臨床的有用性が示され、AD診断ガイドラインの今後の改良に資する知見を提供する。血漿p-tau217はタウ病理の重症度を反映する有望な血液マーカーである。
items.summary_short_ja: 2024年改訂のアルツハイマー病（AD）生物学的・臨床的ステージング基準を中国の専門記憶クリニック1,214例で検証した。アミロイド陽性818例のうち、典型型、感受性型、耐性型に分類され、各群で認知機能やバイオマーカー、神経解剖学的特徴が異なった。血漿p-tau217はタウPETステージの進行に伴い増加し、血液マーカーとしての有用性を示した。本基準は中国集団での臨床的有用性を支持する。

items.title: Thrombectomy for Pediatric Large Vessel Occlusion Stroke With Mild Presenting Symptoms.
items.abstract: Neurologic outcomes after pediatric large vessel occlusion (LVO) stroke are poor. In the absence of a pediatric randomized clinical trial, cohort and registry studies have demonstrated improved outcomes with thrombectomy compared with medical management alone. However, the benefit of thrombectomy in children with LVO and mild presenting symptoms remains uncertain. Our objective was to determine if thrombectomy is associated with superior functional outcomes compared with medical management alone in pediatric patients with acute LVO stroke and mild presenting symptoms. We undertook a case-control study pooling individual patient data from 4 published cohort studies on pediatric LVO stroke (Save ChildS, Save ChildS Pro, KidClot, Pediatric LVO Stroke Study), with patients treated at 75 centers across Europe, North America, and Australia between 2000 and 2023. Patients ≤18 years of age with acute LVO stroke on imaging and pediatric NIH Stroke Scale score ≤5 on admission were included. Patients treated with endovascular thrombectomy were compared with those treated with medical management alone. The primary clinical outcome was the functional status at 3 months after stroke, measured using the pediatric modified Rankin Scale and compared between groups using ordinal regression analysis. The primary safety outcome was the rate of symptomatic intracerebral hemorrhage. Pooled data identified 63 pediatric patients (female: n = 21, 33.3%; mean age 9.6 years, SD 5.1, range 0.5-18.0) who met the inclusion criteria. The cohorts were well balanced for IV thrombolysis status, age, sex, site and side of occlusion, ASPECTS, and stroke etiology. Thrombectomy treated patients (n = 25) had significantly better pediatric modified Rankin Scale scores at 3 months than medically managed patients (n = 38; odds ratio 5.5 [95% CI 1.22-24.81];  Thrombectomy in pediatric LVO stroke with mild presenting symptoms results in improved clinical outcomes compared with medical management alone and may prevent early neurologic deterioration. These findings can assist treating teams with acute clinical decision making in this complex clinical situation. This study provides Class III evidence that in pediatric patients with acute LVO stroke and mild presenting symptoms, thrombectomy results in better functional outcomes compared with medical management alone.
items.summary_ja:
背景：小児の大血管閉塞（LVO）脳卒中は神経学的予後が悪いが、軽度の症状を呈する場合の血栓回収療法の有効性は不明である。  
方法：2000～2023年に欧米豪75施設で治療された18歳以下の急性LVO脳卒中患者63例（NIHSS ≤5）を対象に、血栓回収療法群（25例）と内科的治療群（38例）を比較した。4つのコホート研究から個別患者データを統合し、3か月後の機能的予後（小児修正Rankin尺度）を主要評価項目とした。  
結果：両群は年齢、性別、閉塞部位などで均衡しており、血栓回収療法群は内科的治療群に比べて3か月後の機能的予後が有意に良好であった（オッズ比5.5、95％CI 1.22-24.81）。有害事象としての症候性脳内出血率は報告されていない。  
結論：軽度症状の小児LVO脳卒中に対する血栓回収療法は、内科的治療単独よりも機能的予後を改善し、早期の神経学的悪化を防ぐ可能性がある。これらの知見は臨床判断の支援となる。
items.summary_short_ja: 小児の大血管閉塞（LVO）脳卒中で軽度の症状を呈する患者を対象に、血栓回収術と内科的治療の効果を比較した。4つのコホート研究から63例を解析し、血栓回収術群は3か月後の機能的予後が有意に良好であった。血栓回収術は早期の神経症状悪化を防ぎ、小児LVO脳卒中の治療方針決定に有用なエビデンスを提供する。

items.title: Frequency of Suicidal Ideation and Associations With Autonomic, Motor, and Cognitive Dysfunction in People With REM Sleep Behavior Disorders.
items.abstract: REM sleep behavior disorder (RBD) is characterized by loss of REM sleep atonia leading to dream enactment behavior. Isolated RBD (iRBD) is a known prodrome of alpha-synuclein pathology including Parkinson disease (PD) and dementia with Lewy bodies (DLB). Depression is also a common prodromal symptom of PD/DLB, and death by suicide is greater among individuals with PD. Patients with RBD are at greater risk of comorbid depression, but the prevalence of suicidal ideation in this population is unknown. We aim to assess the frequency of suicidal ideation and whether it is associated with autonomic, motor, and cognitive dysfunction in the North American Prodromal Synucleinopathy 2 (NAPS2) consortium. NAPS2 is a longitudinal study that includes measurements of autonomic function (SCOPA-AUT, orthostatic blood pressure), motor function (UPDRS), cognition (MoCA), and suicidal ideation (PHQ-9). We used a linear mixed-effects model, adjusting for age, sex, impulsivity, current carbidopa/levodopa use, and PHQ-9 score, to compare those who endorsed recent suicidal ideation with those who did not. Of 489 total participants, 40 endorsed suicidal ideation at the first visit (22.5% female, mean age 61.5) and 449 denied suicidal ideation (19.4% female, mean age 64.6). Higher PHQ-9 scores were significantly associated with higher SCOPA-AUT scores (+0.566; SE = 0.045;  Recent suicidal ideation occurred in approximately 1 of 12 patients with iRBD, a prodromal syndrome of PD with an increased risk of death by suicide. Individuals with iRBD who scored higher on PHQ-9 had on average greater autonomic dysfunction on SCOPA-AUT, more motor findings, and greater cognitive deficits. This study establishes that suicidal ideation is common in iRBD and suggests an iRBD phenotype that identifies individuals at high risk of depression and suicide. Future studies should expand on these findings and target interventions to decrease mortality and self-harm.
items.summary_ja:
背景：REM睡眠行動障害（RBD）は、REM睡眠時の筋弛緩消失により夢の行動化を伴い、パーキンソン病（PD）やレビー小体型認知症（DLB）の前駆症状とされる孤立性RBD（iRBD）においては、うつ症状や自殺リスクの増加が指摘されているが、自殺念慮の頻度は不明であった。  
方法：北米の前駆性シヌクレイノパチー研究（NAPS2）に参加した489名のiRBD患者を対象に、自殺念慮（PHQ-9）、自律神経機能（SCOPA-AUT、起立性血圧）、運動機能（UPDRS）、認知機能（MoCA）を評価し、年齢・性別・衝動性・薬物使用・うつ症状を調整した線形混合効果モデルで自殺念慮の有無による関連を解析した。  
結果：参加者のうち約8％（40名）が自殺念慮を報告し、自殺念慮群はPHQ-9スコアが高く、自律神経障害、運動障害、認知機能低下が有意に強かった。  
結論：iRBD患者の約12人に1人が自殺念慮を抱えており、うつ症状の重症度とともに自律神経・運動・認知機能障害が関連することから、自殺リスクの高いiRBDの表現型が示唆された。今後は自殺予防を目的とした介入研究が求められる。
items.summary_short_ja: REM睡眠行動障害（iRBD）はパーキンソン病やレビー小体型認知症の前駆症状であり、自殺念慮の頻度は約8％に達する。本研究では、iRBD患者の自殺念慮が自律神経機能障害、運動障害、認知機能低下と関連することを示した。PHQ-9スコアが高い患者ほどこれらの障害が顕著であり、うつ病や自殺リスクの高いiRBDの表現型を特定できる。今後は介入研究が必要である。

items.title: Phase 2 Futility Trials in Alzheimer Disease and Mild Cognitive Impairment: A Cohort Analysis of the ADNI Data Set.
items.abstract: The cost and complexity of phase 2 randomized-controlled trials (RCTs) hinder further development of promising treatment candidates for Alzheimer disease (AD). The Simon Two-Stage futility trial design, originally developed for oncology, offers a streamlined approach to evaluate potential disease-modifying therapies by comparing single-arm outcomes with historical controls, but is predicated on identifying outcome measures that reliably worsen with the natural history of the disease, with minimal risk of improvement. We sought to determine the feasibility of such futility trials in AD-associated dementia and mild cognitive impairment (MCI) using a large prospective cohort. We analyzed longitudinal data from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI). Cognitive decline was assessed using AD Assessment Scale-Cognitive Subscale (ADAS-Cog 11 and ADAS-Cog 13), Clinical Dementia Rating-Sum of Boxes (CDR-SB), and Mini-Mental State Examination (MMSE) at 6, 12, and 24 months using different thresholds for worsening vs improvement. Binary logistic regression models examined baseline factors associated with cognitive worsening using different thresholds of worsening for each outcome of interest to assess what additional selection criteria may be needed for futility trials in AD-associated dementia vs MCI. Sample size estimates were derived based on expected rates of decline. Among 2,665 participants (mean age 73.4 years [SD: 7.5], 1,260 [47.3%] female, 424 with AD-associated dementia), the CDR-SB exhibited the largest percentage of decline in AD-associated dementia and MCI, with 60.6% of patients with AD-associated dementia showing worsening when using a threshold of ≥1.0 points at 12 months vs 6.2% showing improvement. ADAS-Cog 11 and 13 showed similar decline patterns; for example, 41.7% with AD-associated dementia worsened by ≥ 5 points at 12 months on ADAS-Cog 13, whereas 5.8% improved. MMSE exhibited lower sensitivity; 25.8% with AD-associated dementia worsened by ≥ 5 points at 12 months, whereas 2.9% improved. Shorter trials (6-12 months) with 35-62 participants seemed feasible in AD-associated dementia, whereas MCI trials seemed to require 24 months and specific entry criteria based on age, apolipoprotein E ε4 status, and baseline CDR-SB performance. Futility trials seem feasible in AD-associated dementia, offering a faster, cost-effective alternative to traditional phase 2 RCTs. CDR-SB seems to be the optimal primary outcome. Further validation in clinical trial data sets is warranted.
items.summary_ja:
背景：アルツハイマー病（AD）治療薬の開発において、フェーズ2のランダム化比較試験（RCT）はコストと複雑さが障壁となっている。Simonの2段階フェイティリティ試験デザインは、単群の結果を過去の対照と比較する簡便な方法だが、自然経過で確実に悪化し改善が少ない評価指標の特定が前提となる。  
方法：ADNIの大規模前向きコホートデータを用い、AD関連認知症と軽度認知障害（MCI）における認知機能の経時変化をADAS-Cog 11/13、CDR-SB、MMSEで6、12、24ヶ月時点で評価。悪化と改善の閾値を設定し、二項ロジスティック回帰で悪化に関連するベースライン因子を検討。サンプルサイズも推定した。  
結果：2665名中、AD関連認知症患者の60.6%が12ヶ月でCDR-SBが1点以上悪化し、改善は6.2%にとどまった。ADAS-Cog 13では41.7%が5点以上悪化、MMSEは感度が低く25.8%が5点以上悪化。AD関連認知症では6-12ヶ月の短期試験で35-62名の規模が可能だが、MCIでは24ヶ月の追跡と年齢、APOE ε4、ベースラインCDR-SBによる選択基準が必要だった。  
結論：AD関連認知症におけるフェイリティ試験は従来のフェーズ2 RCTより迅速かつ低コストで実施可能であり、CDR-SBが最適な主要評価指標と考えられる。臨床試験データでのさらなる検証が望まれる。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、アルツハイマー病（AD）および軽度認知障害（MCI）における第2相フェイティリティ試験の実現可能性をADNIデータで検証した。CDR-SBが最も感度が高く、AD関連認知症では6～12ヶ月で35～62例の小規模試験が可能と示唆された。一方、MCIでは24ヶ月の長期観察と特定の選択基準が必要である。CDR-SBを主要評価項目としたフェイリティ試験は、従来のRCTより迅速かつ低コストな治療評価手法として有望である。

items.title: Stroke Severity and Functional Benefit of Thrombectomy in Acute M2 Middle Cerebral Artery Occlusion: A Multicenter Cohort Study.
items.abstract: Recent randomized trials reported no overall functional benefit of endovascular treatment (EVT) for distal medium-vessel occlusion (DMVO) and did not identify consistent effect modifiers to guide patient selection. Consequently, the role of EVT-particularly for M2 occlusions-remains controversial. We investigated whether baseline clinical severity modifies the association between successful recanalization and 90-day outcome in patients with M2 occlusion. Multicenter retrospective cohort study at 2 tertiary stroke centers including consecutive adults with acute ischemic stroke due to M2 occlusion (January 2015-January 2023) triaged by multimodal CT and treated with EVT. The primary end point was functional independence (modified Rankin Scale [mRS] ≤ 2) at 90 days. Secondary end points included symptomatic intracerebral hemorrhage (sICH), mRS 0-1, and penumbra salvage volume (PSV). The primary analysis used multivariable logistic regression with baseline National Institutes of Health Stroke Scale (NIHSS) modeled linearly and an NIHSS×recanalization (modified Thrombolysis in Cerebral Infarction [mTICI] ≥2b) interaction term. Johnson-Neyman probing and inverse probability weighting (IPW) were applied; a supplementary restricted cubic spline analysis was performed to explore potential nonlinearity. Among 147 patients, 85 (58%) achieved successful recanalization. The mean age was 74 years (SD 13), and 47% were female. Higher baseline NIHSS (adjusted odds ratio [aOR] 0.83 per point, 95% CI 0.73-0.94) and older age (aOR 0.96 per year, 95% CI 0.94-0.99) were associated with lower odds of functional independence. NIHSS significantly modified the association between recanalization and outcome (interaction  In M2 occlusions, the magnitude of the association between successful recanalization and functional independence was larger at higher NIHSS and not reliably demonstrable at lower NIHSS. These findings support a severity-informed, individualized EVT approach while remaining hypothesis-generating rather than prescriptive for specific NIHSS thresholds. Major limitations include the retrospective observational design and potential residual confounding.
items.summary_ja:
背景：近年のランダム化試験では、遠位中等血管閉塞（DMVO）に対する血管内治療（EVT）の全体的な機能的利益は示されず、患者選択の指標となる効果修飾因子も特定されていない。特にM2閉塞におけるEVTの役割は依然として議論がある。  
方法：2015年から2023年にかけて、2つの三次脳卒中センターで急性M2閉塞による虚血性脳卒中患者147名を対象に後ろ向き多施設コホート研究を実施。多モーダルCTでトリアージし、EVTを施行。主要評価項目は90日後の機能的自立（mRS ≤2）、副次評価項目に症候性脳内出血やペナンブラ救済量を設定。NIHSSスコアと再開通の相互作用を多変量ロジスティック回帰で解析。  
結果：成功再開通は58%で、平均年齢74歳。高い初期NIHSSと高齢は機能的自立の低下と関連。NIHSSは再開通と機能的自立の関連性を有意に修飾し、高NIHSS患者で再開通の利益が大きい一方、低NIHSSでは明確な利益は示されなかった。  
結論：M2閉塞においては、初期症状の重症度に基づく個別化したEVT戦略が示唆されるが、特定のNIHSS閾値を示すものではなく、仮説生成的な結果である。後ろ向き観察研究である点が限界。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は急性M2中大脳動脈閉塞患者147例を対象に、血栓回収療法（EVT）の効果と初期脳卒中重症度（NIHSS）の関係を多施設で検討した。成功した再開通は58％で、重症度が高い患者ほどEVTによる機能的独立回復（mRS ≤2）との関連が強かった。一方、軽症例では効果が明確でなかった。結果は重症度に応じた個別化治療の重要性を示唆するが、後ろ向き観察研究のため確定的結論は避けるべきである。
